Description.SourceString:
Home is where the heart is. Which is a horrifying statement when you think about it.

Still, home has its advantages, and cosiness is one of those. When you build a home and claim a bed, you’ll find that life just feels much easier to manage. Specifically, you’ll find that your Hydration, Endurance and Sustenance bars become much easier to manage.

While you remain within the comfort of your home, you’ll need to eat less, drink less and rest less. Meaning that you can craft to your hearts content, without worrying about little things like starving to death.
